subcodes.first_line: What needed to be uttered We have uttered, and We have sown the seeds of wisdom in hearts and souls. Together We seek after divine truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه باید گفت گفتیم و حبهای حکمت را در افئده و قلوب کشتیم راز حق میطلبیم جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @effort; striving, @Manifestation of God as sun, @knowledge of self, @living waters; water of life, @goodly deeds; actions
